subject: A tall obelisk-like monolith standing alone in a desolate landscape, with two small robed figures approaching it from below as swirling, multicolored magical energies converge around its peak
description: A monumental dark obelisk rises from a barren rocky plateau, its slender vertical form dominating the composition. The structure is etched with faint glyphs and tapers toward a sharp apex where streams of swirling, iridescent magical energy converge — ribbons of orange, purple, blue, and green light swirling around the monolith like a vortex of mana. Two small robed pilgrim figures stand at the base, dwarfed by the monument, gazing up. The sky behind churns with painterly clouds in violet, gold, and teal, suggesting a magic-hour or otherworldly atmosphere. Lighting is dramatic and ambient, with the obelisk silhouetted against the glowing sky.
foreground: two small robed figures on rocky ground at the base of an obelisk
background: swirling multicolored mana vortex against painterly cloudy sky
emotion: awe, reverence, smallness in the face of grandeur
